description.value:
You've trained relentlessly with your order's weapon to maximize their deadliness. When you get a critical success on a Strike with one of your order's favored weapons, the target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class] save against your class DC. If you have access to that weapon's critical specialization effect, you must choose whether to use that effect or this one.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds until the end of your next turn.

Failure As success, and the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure As success, and the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 2} until the end of your next turn.

value.value: expert in at least one of your order's favored weapons
